name: Tamman – Mental Health Support Platform
description: Led a team to build a full-stack platform for remote psychological support. Features: mood tracking, assessments (PHQ-9, GAD-7, PCL-5), gamified rewards, real-time chat, admin dashboard.

name: MediBook – Medical Appointment System
description: Platform for managing appointments across hospitals, doctors, and patients with role-based access, conflict detection, payment tracking, and interactive dashboards.

name: E-Learning Platform (LMS)
description: Comprehensive LMS with multi-role system, course management, live session scheduling, assignment grading, AI-powered learning paths, and analytics dashboard.
